changeSet.author: jhipster
changeSet.sql: DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_pass_contract_search_vector_gin; ALTER TABLE pass_contract DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS search_vector; ALTER TABLE pass_contract ADD COLUMN search_vector tsvector GENERATED ALWAYS AS ( setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(TITLE, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(DESCRIPTION, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(AGENCY, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(AGENCY_NAME, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(AGENCY_ACRONYM, '')), 'B') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(SUPPLIER, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce( coalesce(COMMODITYCODE, '') || ' ' || regexp_replace(coalesce(COMMODITYCODE, ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g') || ' ' || regexp_replace( regexp_replace(coalesce(COMMODITYCODE, ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), '^([0-9]{3})([0-9]{2})([0-9]{2})$', '\1 \2 \3 \1\2' ), '' )), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(COMMODITYDESCRIPTION, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce( coalesce(CONTRACTNUMBER, '') || ' ' || CASE WHEN coalesce(CONTRACTNUMBER, '') ~* '^CW[0-9]{4,6}$' THEN substring(CONTRACTNUMBER from '[0-9]+$') ELSE '' END, '' )), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(CONTRACTTYPEDESCRIPTION, '')), 'B') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(PROCUREMENTMETHODDESCRIPTION, '')), 'B') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(CONTRACTINGOFFICER, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(CONTRACTADMINISTRATORNAME, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(CONTRACTADMINISTRATOREMAIL, '')), 'B') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(CORPORATEEMAILADDRESS, '')), 'B') ) STORED; CREATE INDEX idx_pass_contract_search_vector_gin ON pass_contract USING GIN (search_vector);
changeSet.rollback: DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_pass_contract_search_vector_gin; ALTER TABLE pass_contract DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS search_vector; ALTER TABLE pass_contract ADD COLUMN search_vector tsvector GENERATED ALWAYS AS ( setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(TITLE, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(DESCRIPTION, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(AGENCY, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(AGENCY_NAME, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(AGENCY_ACRONYM, '')), 'B') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(SUPPLIER, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce( coalesce(COMMODITYCODE, '') || ' ' || regexp_replace(coalesce(COMMODITYCODE, ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g') || ' ' || regexp_replace( regexp_replace(coalesce(COMMODITYCODE, ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), '^([0-9]{3})([0-9]{2})([0-9]{2})$', '\1 \2 \3 \1\2' ), '' )), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(COMMODITYDESCRIPTION, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(CONTRACTNUMBER, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(CONTRACTTYPEDESCRIPTION, '')), 'B') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(PROCUREMENTMETHODDESCRIPTION, '')), 'B') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(CONTRACTINGOFFICER, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(CONTRACTADMINISTRATORNAME, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(CONTRACTADMINISTRATOREMAIL, '')), 'B') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(CORPORATEEMAILADDRESS, '')), 'B') ) STORED; CREATE INDEX idx_pass_contract_search_vector_gin ON pass_contract USING GIN (search_vector);
